write_scope: scripts/generate_translation_drafts.py; src/play_book_studio/ingestion/translation_draft_generation.py; scripts/promote_translation_gold.py; src/play_book_studio/ingestion/translation_gold_promotion.py; scripts/rebuild_active_gold_corpus.py; manifests/ocp_ko_4_20_translated_ko_draft.json; data/silver_ko/translation_drafts; data/gold_candidate_books; data/wiki_runtime_books; reports/build_logs; reports/execution_harness
